title: urachne canadensis
intro: Urachne canadensis, also known as the Canadian stickgrass or needle grass, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Poaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Urachne canadensis include relief from congestion, reduced inflammation, and improved respiratory function. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, although the availability and quality of these preparations may vary depending on the region and source.
